mnemonics.title: Graph Types
mnemonics.content: DUB Wants Cake: Directed, Undirected, Bipartite, Weighted, Complete

mnemonics.title: Adjacency Matrix
mnemonics.content: AMAL: Adjacency Matrix Always Lists all possible vertex pairs

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a chessboard where each square shows connection between row and column vertices

analogies.analogy: Like a contact list on your phone - each entry (vertex) has direct links to their connections (edges)
